report.summary: Audited two new altcoin ETF pages for UX issues, created OG images (SVG+PNG) for both, and implemented accessibility/interaction refinements across the tracker tool and learn guide.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Fixed search input accessibility: replaced outline:none with visible focus ring (2px solid #6366f1) on altcoin ETF tracker
Added aria-label to search input for screen reader support
Added keyboard accessibility to sortable table headers: tabIndex, onKeyDown (Enter/Space), aria-sort attribute
Added focus ring styles to asset filter buttons (ALL/SOL/XRP/ETH) with outline-offset for dark theme
Improved empty state: added SearchX icon, descriptive message, and 'Clear filters' CTA button
Fixed React Fragment key warning — replaced bare <> with <Fragment key={...}> on table row groups
Added aria-expanded attribute to expandable table rows for screen reader feedback
Added ref-based smooth scrolling to expanded detail panel so it stays visible on mobile
Added hover underline effect to Table of Contents links in altcoin ETF guide for better affordance

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: altcoin-etf-guide-2026 (1200x630) — SVG + PNG with SOL/XRP/ETH asset cards, key stats panel, gradient accent bar
OG image: altcoin-etf-tracker (1200x630) — SVG + PNG with mini ETF data table, AUM breakdown chart, staking/fee highlights

sections.title: Files Modified
items: src/app/tools/altcoin-etf-tracker/page.tsx — Fragment import, accessibility fixes, empty state improvement, scroll-into-view, focus rings
public/og-altcoin-etf-guide-2026.png — new OG image (PNG for social sharing)
public/og-altcoin-etf-tracker.png — new OG image (PNG for social sharing)
